  1. Trier /

  3. Hotel Roemischer Kaiser

★★★★ · Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hotel Roemischer Kaiser

⭐ 8.5/10 · 850 reviews · From 110 €

The Hotel Roemischer Kaiser sits directly at the Porta Nigra and ranks among Trier's traditional houses. 43 rooms, an in-house restaurant with Moselle cuisine and a cozy bar. Perfect for sightseeing travelers.

Amenities

Porta-LageRestaurantBar

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Park Plaza Trier

Comfortable 4-star hotel on the Kornmarkt, three minutes from the Porta Nigra (the Black Gate) and the cathedral.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
